changes: Share projects via short links with QR codes and a 30-day history
Read-only shared view (/view) and import-preview page (/s) for received links
Compact binary share format (Brotli + Base64URL) that packs a whole project into a URL
Language flags on setup and shared pages, rotating through countries for multi-region languages
Keyboard shortcuts in the editor (play/pause, seek, line navigation, quick edit)
Editor: Share/Export split button, animated floating actions, and instant sync-on-seek
Diacritic-insensitive project search
Respects prefers-reduced-motion for flag rotation
i18n: new keys for sharing and flags (EN, ES, PT)
Internal: source regrouped into lib/share and lib/config; shared ConfirmDialog, MessageModal, and LoadingOverlay
Internal: extracted usePageShell, useSmartBack, useCoverTilt, and useSharedProjectLoader hooks
Internal: leaner, higher-signal test suite with a shared project factory
Audio player with waveform progress bar, URL/local file support, and LRC sync
Undo/redo for editor changes with snapshot history (max 10 steps)
YAML project export and import (full project backup/restore)
Redesigned export dialog with format and content dropdowns
All Projects page with client-side search and 5-column responsive grid
Project card: export option added to context menu
Auto-calculate progress and status on project creation
Improved scrollbar styling with visible track
i18n: 30 new keys for player, export, and undo/redo (EN, ES, PT)
Material 3 Expressive loading indicator with 7 morphing shapes
AI provider selection for auto translation (Draft intention)
Worker proxy correctly returns Odesli streaming links
Search: 'no results' feedback and larger loading indicator
Internal: metadata extraction refactored into 7-step pipeline
Internal: lyrics parser rewritten with clear naming
Initial release
Lyric editor with timestamp controls
LRC and SRT export
Multi-language interface (EN, ES, PT)
MusicBrainz, Deezer, and Odesli metadata integration
